seoTitle: Burra Burri vs Burrum Heads — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burra Burri and Burrum Heads. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burra Burri vs Burrum Heads: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burra Burri and Burrum Heads.
heading: Burra Burri vs Burrum Heads — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burra Burri, Queensland and Burrum Heads, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrum Heads has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Burra Burri (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burra Burri or Burrum Heads safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burra Burri has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Burrum Heads scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burra Burri scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Burrum Heads scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burra Burri or Burrum Heads?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrum Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
